description_long: This sculpture depicts a headless and armless human torso, draped in flowing, classical-style robes reminiscent of ancient Greco-Roman statuary. The figure stands upright on a rectangular plinth, with the fabric rendered in smooth, undulating folds that suggest movement and weight. The surface is highly polished, giving the appearance of white marble with subtle gray veining. The back of the sculpture shows the drapery cascading down, while the sides reveal the depth and volume of the carved fabric. The left shoulder is slightly raised, and the right arm is missing, with the garment gathered at the waist. The overall form is elegant and idealized, evoking the timeless aesthetic of classical antiquity.
description: A polished, white marble-like sculpture of a draped, headless human torso standing on a rectangular base, with detailed flowing robes and classical styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the draped torso, missing head and arms, and the detailed folds of the robe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the drapery and the raised left shoulder.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cascading folds of the robe and the back of the torso.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the missing right arm and the gathered garment at the waist.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
